name: ReputeAI Design System
description: Enterprise-grade design system for ReputeAI - Angular 20 + Material Design 3 + Tailwind CSS with advanced animations and responsive design

designPrinciples.materialFirst: Always use Angular Material components as the foundation
designPrinciples.responsiveFirst: Mobile-first approach with tablet and desktop enhancements
designPrinciples.animationDriven: Smooth, purposeful animations that enhance user experience
designPrinciples.accessible: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant with keyboard and screen reader support
designPrinciples.performant: Optimized bundle size, lazy loading, and efficient rendering

colors.description: Material Design 3 color tokens with Tailwind utilities

primary.name: Primary Blue
primary.usage: Main brand color, primary actions, links, active states

success.usage: Successful operations, low risk, positive feedback

typography.description: Material Design 3 type scale with Roboto font family

spacing.description: Responsive spacing system using Tailwind's scale

container.responsive: px-4 py-8 md:px-8 md:py-12 lg:px-12 lg:py-20

section.responsive: space-y-8 py-12 md:space-y-12 md:py-16 lg:space-y-20 lg:py-24

card.responsive: p-4 space-y-3 md:p-6 md:space-y-4 lg:p-8 lg:space-y-6

borderRadius.description: Border radius following Material Design 3 guidelines

button.material: Material buttons have built-in border radius

input.material: Material form fields handle this automatically

containerSizes.responsive: w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8

animations.description: Advanced animation system using Angular Animations + Tailwind

fadeIn.definition: trigger('fadeIn', [transition(':enter', [style({ opacity: 0 }), animate('300ms ease-out', style({ opacity: 1 }))])])

slideInUp.definition: trigger('slideInUp', [transition(':enter', [style({ transform: 'translateY(100%)', opacity: 0 }), animate('400ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1)', style({ transform: 'translateY(0)', opacity: 1 }))])])

slideInDown.definition: trigger('slideInDown', [transition(':enter', [style({ transform: 'translateY(-100%)', opacity: 0 }), animate('400ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1)', style({ transform: 'translateY(0)', opacity: 1 }))])])

slideInLeft.definition: trigger('slideInLeft', [transition(':enter', [style({ transform: 'translateX(-100%)' }), animate('300ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1)', style({ transform: 'translateX(0)' }))])])

scaleIn.definition: trigger('scaleIn', [transition(':enter', [style({ transform: 'scale(0.8)', opacity: 0 }), animate('250ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)', style({ transform: 'scale(1)', opacity: 1 }))])])

listAnimation.definition: trigger('listAnimation', [transition('* => *', [query(':enter', [style({ opacity: 0, transform: 'translateY(20px)' }), stagger('50ms', [animate('300ms ease-out', style({ opacity: 1, transform: 'translateY(0)' }))])], { optional: true })])])

routeAnimation.definition: trigger('routeAnimation', [transition('* <=> *', [style({ position: 'relative' }), query(':enter, :leave', [style({ position: 'absolute', top: 0, left: 0, width: '100%' })], { optional: true }), query(':enter', [style({ opacity: 0, transform: 'translateX(100%)' })], { optional: true }), query(':leave', [animate('300ms ease-in', style({ opacity: 0, transform: 'translateX(-100%)' }))], { optional: true }), query(':enter', [animate('300ms 100ms ease-out', style({ opacity: 1, transform: 'translateX(0)' }))], { optional: true })])])

materialComponents.description: Angular Material component usage with responsive configurations

responsive.desktop: <button mat-raised-button color="primary" class="px-8 py-4 text-lg">Get Started</button>

responsive.tablet: <mat-card appearance="outlined" class="border-2 rounded-xl hover:border-primary transition-colors duration-300">

responsive.mobile:
<mat-form-field appearance="outline" class="w-full">
  <mat-label>Email</mat-label>
  <input matInput type="email" required>
  <mat-icon matPrefix class="text-gray-400">email</mat-icon>
  <mat-error>Valid email required</mat-error>
  <mat-hint>We'll never share your email</mat-hint>
</mat-form-field>
responsive.tablet:
<mat-form-field appearance="outline" class="w-full md:w-2/3">
  <mat-label>Email</mat-label>
  <input matInput type="email" required>
  <mat-icon matPrefix>email</mat-icon>
  <mat-error>Valid email required</mat-error>
</mat-form-field>
responsive.desktop:
<mat-form-field appearance="outline" class="w-full lg:w-1/2">
  <mat-label>Email</mat-label>
  <input matInput type="email" required>
  <mat-icon matPrefix>email</mat-icon>
  <mat-error>Valid email required</mat-error>
</mat-form-field>

responsive.tablet: <mat-checkbox class="text-base" color="primary">Remember me</mat-checkbox>

<mat-radio-group class="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:space-x-6 space-y-2 md:space-y-0">
  <mat-radio-button value="daily">Daily</mat-radio-button>
  <mat-radio-button value="weekly">Weekly</mat-radio-button>
</mat-radio-group>

<mat-slider class="w-full md:w-2/3" min="0" max="100" step="1">
  <input matSliderThumb>
</mat-slider>

responsive.mobile:
this.dialog.open(DialogComponent, {
  width: '100vw',
  height: '100vh',
  maxWidth: '100vw',
  maxHeight: '100vh',
  panelClass: 'mobile-dialog',
  enterAnimationDuration: '300ms',
  exitAnimationDuration: '200ms'
})
responsive.tablet:
this.dialog.open(DialogComponent, {
  width: '90vw',
  maxWidth: '600px',
  panelClass: 'tablet-dialog',
  enterAnimationDuration: '300ms',
  exitAnimationDuration: '200ms'
})
responsive.desktop:
this.dialog.open(DialogComponent, {
  width: '600px',
  maxWidth: '90vw',
  panelClass: ['desktop-dialog', 'animate-scaleIn'],
  enterAnimationDuration: '300ms',
  exitAnimationDuration: '200ms',
  backdropClass: 'backdrop-blur-sm'
})

responsive.tablet: <mat-progress-bar mode="determinate" [value]="progress" color="primary" class="h-1.5"></mat-progress-bar>
<mat-progress-spinner mode="indeterminate" diameter="48" color="primary"></mat-progress-spinner>

<button mat-icon-button matTooltip="Delete content permanently" matTooltipPosition="above" matTooltipShowDelay="500">

</button>

</button>

advancedAnimations.description: Advanced animation patterns and custom keyframes

text.testing: Use Chrome DevTools or WAVE tool

interactive.buttons: 3:1 minimum contrast for button borders and states

focusManagement.visible: Always show focus indicators: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-2
focusManagement.keyboard: All interactive elements must be keyboard accessible (Tab, Enter, Space, Arrow keys)
focusManagement.trapFocus: Use MatDialog and MatBottomSheet which handle focus trapping automatically
focusManagement.skipLinks: Skip to main content

aria.labels: Use aria-label or aria-labelledby for all interactive elements without visible text
aria.roles: Material components include appropriate ARIA roles automatically
aria.live: Use aria-live="polite" for dynamic content updates (snackbars include this)

screenReader.srOnlyClass: .sr-only { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0,0,0,0); white-space: nowrap; border-width: 0; }
screenReader.announcements: Use MatSnackBar or LiveAnnouncer service for status updates

touch.hoverStates: Hide hover-only interactions on touch devices: @media (hover: hover) { }

changeDetection.trackBy:
<mat-list-item *ngFor="let item of items; trackBy: trackById">
  <!-- Content -->
</mat-list-item>

trackById(index: number, item: any): number {
  return item.id;
}

virtualScrolling.cdkVirtual:
<cdk-virtual-scroll-viewport itemSize="80" class="h-screen">
  <mat-list-item *cdkVirtualFor="let item of items" class="h-20">
    <!-- Item content -->
  </mat-list-item>
</cdk-virtual-scroll-viewport>

setup.material:
ng add @angular/material
# Select theme: Custom
# Typography: Yes
# Animations: Yes
setup.tailwind:
npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer
npx tailwindcss init

Quick Actions

dos: ✅ Use Angular Material components as the foundation
✅ Apply Tailwind for spacing, sizing, and custom styling
✅ Use semantic HTML and ARIA labels
✅ Implement proper error handling and loading states
✅ Use OnPush change detection for performance
✅ Test on multiple devices and screen sizes
donts: ❌ Don't override Material component styles unnecessarily
❌ Don't use inline styles (use Tailwind classes)
❌ Don't forget mobile touch target sizes (44px minimum)
❌ Don't use too many animations (causes motion sickness)
❌ Don't forget loading and error states
❌ Don't use deprecated Angular or Material APIs
❌ Don't forget to test keyboard navigation
